videos.title: The Loppet Foundation: Rosario's Story
videos.description: Rosario was introduced to skiing in 3rd grade through The Loppet Foundation's MinneLoppet program at Nellie Stone Johnson Community School in North Minneapolis, challenged herself on that school's Junior Loppet team in middle school, and now aspires to be a surgeon and Olympian.

videos.title: Nordenskiöldsloppet 2025. The world’s longest and toughest ski race. The highlights.
videos.description:
This was Nordenskiöldsloppet 2025!

On March 29, 2025, the 8th edition of Nordenskiöldsloppet in modern times took place.
The race follows a historic route from 1884 and leads through untouched wilderness north of the Arctic Circle. It’s an extraordinary skiing adventure spanning 220 km, creating memories that last a lifetime.

Johan Lövgren from Vännäs SK and Sofia Lindberg from Robertsfors IK/Team Edux claimed victory in their respective races with strong performances! 🏆

Register now and write your own hero story.

www.nordenskioldsloppet.com

Video: Vertikal Films Sweden/ Nordenskiöldsloppet
